Case# CTLineBreakMode.byClipping

iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
case byClipping
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/ctlinebreakmode/byclipping#Discussion)

Lines are simply not drawn past the edge of the frame.
